ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "reporting_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the district data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the report is generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "cumulative_passengers_from_china" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of passengers from China under observation */,
  "cumulative_asymptomatic_passengers" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of asymptomatic passengers under home isolation */,
  "cumulative_hospitalized_passengers" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of symptomatic passengers hospitalized */,
  "symptomatic_passengers_hospitalized_today" INTEGER /* Number of symptomatic passengers hospitalized today */,
  "total_symptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of symptomatic cases */,
  "total_asymptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of asymptomatic cases */,
  "total_under_observation" INTEGER /* Total number of patients under observation */,
  "total_under_home_isolation" INTEGER /* Total number of patients under home isolation */,
  "total_new_symptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of new symptomatic cases */,
  "total_new_asymptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of new asymptomatic cases */,
  "total_new_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of new hospitalized cases */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_types" (
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case type */,
  "case_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the case type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the case type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patient status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the patient is located */,
  "case_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the case type of the patient */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the patient */,
  "date_of_reporting" TEXT /* Date when the patient was reported */,
  "date_of_symptom_onset" TEXT /* Date when symptoms started */,
  "date_of_isolation" TEXT /* Date when isolation began */,
  "date_of_hospitalization" TEXT /* Date when hospitalization occurred */,
  "date_of_recovery" TEXT /* Date when recovery was confirmed */,
  "date_of_death" TEXT /* Date when the patient died */,
  "is_recovered" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has recovered */,
  "is_deceased" INTEGER /* Indicates if the patient has died */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES patient_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_case_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_type_id") REFERENCES case_types ("case_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary report */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the summary is generated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "total_symptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of symptomatic cases */,
  "total_asymptomatic" INTEGER /* Total number of asymptomatic cases */,
  "total_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of hospitalized cases */,
  "total_new_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Total number of new hospitalized cases today */,
  "total_under_observation" INTEGER /* Total number of patients under observation */,
  "total_under_home_isolation" INTEGER /* Total number of patients under home isolation */,
  "total_recovered" INTEGER /* Total number of recovered cases */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_summary_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report accessed (if applicable) */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient accessed (if applicable) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., alert, update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, CSV, Database) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Last synchronization time */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
